description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a classic design, featuring a long, cylindrical barrel and a wooden full stock. The barrel is matte black and extends forward from the receiver, with a ribbed wooden fore-end that serves as the pump mechanism. The receiver and trigger assembly are compact, with a rounded trigger guard and a visible trigger. The wooden stock is smoothly contoured and stained a dark brown, providing a traditional appearance and ergonomic grip. The overall construction appears robust, with metal components for the barrel and receiver, and wood for the stock and pump. The shotgun is designed for two-handed operation and is typical of those used in law enforcement or civilian settings.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a matte black barrel, ribbed wooden fore-end, and a dark brown full stock. The design is robust and traditional, combining metal and wood elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the matte black barrel, ribbed wooden pump, and dark brown full stock.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun, with the pump and stock aligned behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the same features as view 0, with the stock and pump visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the pump and trigger guard barely visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
